title: How quants really make money.
summary: QFEX is a 24/7 perpetual futures exchange founded in 2025 by Annanay Kapila and Joshua Wharton, offering up to 50x leverage on US stocks, forex, and commodities without broker intermediaries. The platform raised $9.5M in seed funding led by General Catalyst in March 2026, reaching a $95M valuation.
